title: leontodon hirtus var. crassifolius
intro: Leontodon hirtus var. crassifolius, a variant of the hairy hawk's-beard plant, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat conditions such as kidney stones and arthritis. The health benefits of Leontodon hirtus var. crassifolius include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine, particularly in European folk remedies.
